entry.title: Re: Cleared in the meantime"error message
entry.content: no,journal entries appears in the open item status

entry.title: Re: link to generate absence quota with work schedule rule
entry.content:
You can use VARSTDAYPG in a time schema, query work schedule for employees with 5 days a week. its possible in time schema.

if you still want to work with RPTQTA00, you have to query employee who has Work schedule with 5 days a week and input the Personnel number into "RPTQTA00".  so the report will run and generate absence only for those employees....

entry.title: Re: CDS for Manage Customer Line Items
entry.content:
Hi Shashankagg,

Are you asking about the app Manage Customer Line Items (i guess yes from the title?)?

Let provide some general hints before getting more specific.

I would start in the Fiori App Library - you can filter it for Public Cloud, for example. Sometimes the implementation details or support details will give hints on the data object used: Here is the relevant to the app:

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/index.html#/detail/Apps('F0711')/S32

The Fiori app library will also point you to the relevant help articles and whether the app is extensible.

Here is the help to the app

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/37e57e54279c2457e10000000a44176d.html?locale=en-US

Here is the help to the app extensibility 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/9d56d8dfe9e34405bb0a16ad8c4aa20b.html?locale=en-US

Another option is use the View Browser app to search for example on "Customer Line Items"

In this case we see none of the views are released for Key User or Developer Extensibility.

So you might need to look at a more generic view of Line Items or Customer Invoice.

Could you provide some more details about your requirement?

Are you looking for Key User (custom fields, CBO, etc) or Developer Extensibility.

Note also the app allows users to export the data to Excel, for example (see the Sheet icon below). You may also get some insight from the Developer Tools in Chrome or your browser (also in the screenshot)

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: TMG Event related Issue
entry.content: NO userid is not Field it's used for Separating Records of table

entry.title: Re: RPTQTA00 quota generated
entry.content:
Hi 

Configure base entitlement as "Calendar year" instead of accrual period. sample screenshot is shown below.

in Generation rule, select Accrula period as calendar year, as shown in below screenshot. and run the report system will default correct absences in report "RPTQTA00".

entry.title: Related Field in Template
entry.content:

I have added a custom filed in related field in my template. The custom field type is "Attribute". To my notice,  I don't get to change the display type. There is only one option drop-down. 

I need to select multiple values in the custom field values. Can you please suggest on how to do this.

Thank you

Abdul Hakim

entry.content: Here, I'm not sure if you are asking something or not. Considering what you say, it means that you should consider the second part of Raymond's answer. I guess it solves your question, right?

entry.title: Re: Meanings of PWDSTATE of USR02
entry.content:
SAP don't document the meanings of tables.

Why do you need an official documentation?

entry.title: Is there any way we can change the quantity in GR once the goods receipt is posted.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In order to get the system batch number, store do MIGO for full quantity of the purchase order. After labeling the batch number for the MIGO quantity. From bay take into the storage area form their only counting take in place. If quantity shortage is any way to change the MIGO quantity & repost. Please guide me on this.

Thanks & Regards.

As @Sandra rossi wrote, if there is not field USERID, then consider the 'else' suggestion.

entry.title: Ariba reporting on custom form fields
entry.content:
We have created custom form ‘Catalog Request Form’ with classic approval process.

Can I create Ariba reports with the data from the Custom Form except ‘Pending Approvals’?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Ariba reporting on custom form fields
entry.content:
Currently there is no analytical report to export custom form/eform data.
Form administrators can export form data to a CSV file by using the steps found in How do I export form data for reporting?

If you are not aware of how to create analytical reports please go through the below document
https://help.sap.com/docs/ARIBA_PROCUREMENT/011ba4b6b0724e138b6ef0a1effabb3a/9d133e82a06d1014a61a97827973f73d.html

entry.title: Enable Now objects - Context to SAP Companion repeat on every screen. How do I fix?
entry.content: While placing context on an object in Enable Now to display in SAP Companion, the same screen ID shows as the Context for the Sourcing page, the Supplier Management page, the Purchase Order page, the Purchase Requisition and Approvals page.  The context provided in SAP Companion is the same in SAP Companion for all these pages.  When I assign the context to each, all the Enable Now objects repeat in all these pages because context is the same for all the pages.  How do I fix?

entry.title: Re: Settings-> API missing from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: I have completely the same situation. Even if I re-activate Capabilities, assign roles, etc. "APIs" under settings appear till I click on it. After long time of processing I'm logged off and situation "APIs" disappeared from the list again.

entry.title: OAuth SAML Bearer question
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have read through the following deep dive blog regarding OAuth SAML bearer assertion flow.

Deep Dive 8 with SAP Cloud SDK: Leverage Principal... - SAP Community

My question is: is SAP Cloud Identity registered in the SAP cloud platform as trusted IdP also the IdP for resource server (SAP S/4HANA)?

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Re: in OS01 tcode , what is presentation server and how i...
entry.content:
Hi Garima,

The "presentation server" is generally the client, or "front end," whereas the "application server" is the system the client is connecting to. If you are using SAPGUI, then the SAPGUI is the presentation server.

Cheers,
Matt

entry.title: SAP Extended Warehouse Management in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01, Private Cloud is here!
entry.content:
We are happy to announce the release of SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) in SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS01, Private Cloud. This release marks our continued commitment to empowering businesses of all sizes to optimize their supply chain execution and run their warehouse operations with efficiency and agility.

In line with our six-monthly release cadence of feature packs between the major releases, this release focuses on enhancing integrated processes, continuous improvements, and user experience. The targeted business benefits include improved inventory consistency, enhanced process transparency, reduced clerical efforts and errors, and eliminating the need for custom development efforts.

Key features in this release include:

  1. Improved inbound integration with Logistics Execution (LE) and Transportation Management (TM) after partial goods receipt.
  2. Ability to assign more than one bin to a Production Supply Area (PSA).       
  3. Support for batch-specific unit of measure for various processes like goods receipt and issue, quality inspection, packing, warehouse task creation and confirmation, posting changes, physical inventory.
  4. Assigning printers to resources like a printer mounted on a forklift or in a RF menu for warehouse tasks in specific areas of the warehouse.
  5. Ability to verify batches on a RF device during physical inventory counting.

For further details refer to the What’s New Blog.

At SAP, we are dedicated to driving innovations and delivering solutions that empower businesses to thrive in today’s dynamic supply chain environment. To learn more about SAP S/4HANA for Extended Warehouse Management private edition, contact your SAP Account Executive.

entry.title: Snapshot Table Mass Delete
entry.content: Please let me know how delete multiple entries from Snapshot table.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now objects - Context to SAP Companion repeat...

entry.title: Re: Announcing General Availability of SAP Build Code: Speed up development with generative AI
entry.content:
@utkarsh1129  I'd suggest posting your question to the Test Drive, see the following
Test drive Joule's generative AI features in SAP B... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: SAC to BigQuery data transfer using Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hello Peter.  You can Integrate SAP Open Connectors with SAP Datasphere to be able to connect to third party data sources powered by SAP Open Connectors. Learn more with documentation 

Replication Flows in SAP Datasphere allows you to replicate data from multiple source objects from a connected source to a target like Google BigQuery including simple projection and mapping capabilities.

You can enable a single initial load or request initial and delta loads to load changes at regular intervals. It depends on the connection type if you can use the connection as source or target connection. Learn more with documentation

Please note that you can only use a non-SAP target for a replication flow if your admin has assigned capacity units to Premium Outbound Integration

You can use e Google BigQuery as the target for your replication flow by following the documentation

For SAP Analytics Cloud, you can create live data connections to SAP Datasphere systems, and access any SAP Datasphere Analytical Dataset, Analytic Model or Perspective within SAP Analytics Cloud. SAP Help|Documentation

In addition you can also explore Exporting Data Connection to OData Services from SAP Analytics Cloud.

Hope this helps

Thanks

entry.title: EWM : POSC Inbound Door determination using HU Type Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using POSC set up for Inbound Delivery processing which uses rule based Door Determination. 

I have maintained WH process Type + Door Det Grp + HU Type in  /SCWM/STADET_IN  and marked corresponding columns  /SCWM/STADET_ASS .

However, door determinitations does not return any results. If we remove HU Type from /SCWM/STADET_IN and de-seect  the same in  /SCWM/STADET_ASS, it works as expected. 

After debugging the issue with door determinations using  WH process Type + Door Det Grp + HU Type we get to know that TU is checked against Delivery when it is distributed in EWM.

If TU is assigned then only HU details are fetched and used in determination logic. Currently HU is assigned to IBD but not considered in door determinations because TU check in standard.

Can anyone please suggest how can we make it work without TU or is there any workaround possible.

Thanks 🙂

entry.title: Re: EWM - SOS reference in ODO
entry.content: Thanks for writing. I adjusted MRP3 view and it worked

entry.title: How to get the list of user's profile and privileges in SAP PowerDesigner 16.7 using vbs
entry.content:
How to get the list of user's profile and privileges in SAP PowerDesigner 16.7 using  vbs?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to get the list of user's profile and privileges...
entry.content:
You can find the necessary info to build you own custom code, ang the info you are looking for (the list of user's profile and privileges in SAP PowerDesigner 16.7 sp07 using VBS) by opening the metamodel objects help. From there you may look into RepositoryUser, RepositoryDocumentBase (.GetPermission).

See KBA# 3451439-How to get the list of user's profile and privileges in SAP PowerDesigner using VBS - PD

You can also get some relevant information from KBA#  2767881 - How to get the list of groups, members and their rights - SAP PD  Which treats the same but with an SQL query code instead of VBS.

entry.title: Extend item node element to OData
entry.content: In a custom business object in the item node I have an element named 'ExternalID'. I need to expose this element to OData to use in Dataworkbench. When in the OData Service Explorer to add the element to an OData Service I get the error "Cannot create property;entity for association does not exist". I've tried looking through the documentation and can't find anything that explains how to extend this element. Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: AB08 Only Trying to Reverse for Depreciation Areas of IFRS
entry.content:
Hi All

Has anyone ever experienced the Assertion dump when trying to reverse asset transfer posting using the AB08 transaction code?

Background.

I am trying to reverse a document posted in the last fiscal year and I have also opened this fiscal year once again. But I am getting a short dump related to assertion.

When I debugged the system, i realized that the assertion failed because the system was trying to reverse the posting in the depreciation areas only related to the IFRS ledger even though we have the posting in the GAAP ledger

Please if you have any input regarding this I will really appreciate.

entry.title: Guide: Deploying CAP Application with SQLite Database
entry.content:
Who should read this blog?

If you're a developer working with CAP (SAP Cloud Application Programming Model) and seeking guidance on deploying your applications in the BTP (SAP Business Technology Platform) Cloud Foundry environment with SQLite database integration, this blog is tailor-made for you.

Motivation

Picture this: You're building an app for training sessions. Initially, we thought of using HANA Cloud, but then we thought, "Hey, let's try SQLite for simplicity during development and testing." Everything was smooth sailing while tinkering with it in our BAS (Business Application Studio). But when it came to deploying and testing the app, SQLite just wouldn't cut it. We needed to figure out how to make our app work with SQLite for development but still deploy smoothly. After some trial and error, we cracked the code.

Just a heads-up: This trick is only for playing around with your app during development and testing. It's not suitable for the big leagues of production.

Pre-requisite

  1. Business application studio
  2. Cloud foundry space
  3. Create CAP project from template

Please following steps after you have created a CAP project -

  • Update the package.json to reflect these entries.
{
    "requires": {
        "db": {
            "kind": "sqlite",
            "credentials": {
                "database": "db.sqlite"
            }
        },
        "auth": {
            "[development]": {
                "kind": "dummy"
            },
            "[production]": {
                "kind": "basic",
                "users": {
                    "admin": {
                        "password": "admin"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}​
  • Open package.json from root directory and modify following-
    1. Remove "@cap-js/sqlite” from dev dependencies and add "@cap-js/sqlite" to dependencies.
    2. Open Terminal and run npm install
  • Now let's modify mta.yaml file where we are going to add a couple of commands which will deploy the SQLite and also copy the SQLite file during deployment.
build-parameters:
 before-all:
- builder: custom 
  commands:
   - npmci
   - npx cds build --production - npx cds deploy
   - cp -r db.sqlite gen/srv
  • Last step is build and deploy your application on cloud foundry 
    1. mbt build 
    2. cf deploy ‘path_to_your_mta_archive’

Conclusion : 

With this quick tweak, you'll be all set to create and deploy CAP applications with SQLite databases. Hopefully, this helps your next project!

entry.title: Re: Backoffice Login Failure 2105
entry.content:
Hello former_member74128,

Thanks for reaching out in our Community!

This error Error occurred while processing widgets configuration is related to your widgets configuration set on your environment. For that, I recommend to reset the configuration files to default.
Please read the SAP Help page, based on your SAP Commerce version 2105.6: Resetting Backoffice Configuration

Kind regards,
Sabrina

entry.title: how to add a header message within the tile?
entry.content: Can we add a custom message at the fiori header.

entry.title: Re: How to stop transaction using a script in vba
entry.content:
Hello @GusRomez 
you can try this to press Stop Transaction in the System Menu of the SAP GUI for Windows:

 

Set WshShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")

' // Bring window in foreground
session.ActiveWindow.Iconify()
session.ActiveWindow.Restore()

' // Send Alt and Space and s for Stop Transaction
WScript.Sleep(500)
WshShell.SendKeys "% "
WScript.Sleep(64)
WshShell.SendKeys "s"
WScript.Sleep(64)
WshShell.SendKeys "{Enter}"

 

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: The function can not be called in sapui5. Shortcut is not executable.
entry.content:
I have a button called EXPORT and now I need to create a shortcut to export file to excel. The short cut is Ctrl+Alt+E. When I press the shortcut it have to call the function "onCommandExecution" which will check the ID condition and execute the function "onExportToExcel". I have been made debugging an I the ID was not called in the function. In other words the function onCommandExecution has not been called. The problem have to be either in view file or in manifest file but I see that both are correct!Does someone have a solution please?

Thank you

//Controller.js file
		      onCommandExecution: function(oEvent) {
              var mSId = oEvent.getSource().getId();
              if (mSId === "CE_EXPORT") {
                
                  this.onExportToExcel();
              }
		  },
			onExportToExcel: function() {
			var oSettings, oSheet, aProducts;
			var aCols = [];
			aCols = this.createColumnConfig();

			aProducts = this.byId("messageTable").getModel("oMessageModel").getProperty('/');
			var oDate = new Date();
			var regex = new RegExp(",", "g");
			var aDateArr = oDate.toISOString().split("T")[0].split("-");
			var sDate = aDateArr.join().replace(regex, "");
			var aTimeArr = oDate.toISOString().split("T")[1].split(":");
			var sSeconds = oDate.toISOString().split("T")[1].split(":")[2].split(".")[0];
			var sTime = aTimeArr[0] + aTimeArr[1] + sSeconds;

			oSettings = {
				workbook: {
					columns: aCols
				},
				dataSource: aProducts,
				fileName: "export_" + sDate + sTime
			};

			oSheet = new Spreadsheet(oSettings);
			oSheet.build()
				.then(function() {
					MessageToast.show(this.getOwnerComponent().getModel("i18n").getResourceBundle().getText("excelDownloadSuccessful"));
				})
				.finally(function() {
					oSheet.destroy();
				});

		},
//view.xml file
<Page>
<footer>
			<OverflowToolbar >
				<Button icon="sap-icon://excel-attachment" text="{i18n>exportToExcelBtn}" press="onExportToExcel" tooltip="{i18n>exportToExcelBtnTooltip}"/>
			</OverflowToolbar>
		</footer>
		<dependents>
		<core:CommandExecution id="CE_EXPORT" command="Export" enabled="true" execute="onCommandExecution" />
		</dependents>
//manifest.json file
"sap.ui5": {
        "rootView": {
            "viewName": "com.volkswagen.ifdb.cc.sa.view.Main",
            "type": "XML"
        },
        "dependencies": {
            "minUI5Version": "1.65.0",
            "libs": {
                "sap.m": {},
                "sap.ui.comp": {},
                "sap.ui.core": {},
                "sap.ui.layout": {},
                "sap.ushell": {}
            }
        },
        "contentDensities": {
            "compact": true,
            "cozy": true
        },
        "commands": {
            "Export":{
                "shortcut": "Ctrl+Alt+E"
            }
        },

entry.title: Re: Share module nativescript doesnt exist in share scope...
entry.content: Hi Jitendra sorry for the late response, i´m running the client in sap mobile services. When i tried to create a branded client via mdk sdk the application dosent update to the latest version

entry.title: When using Idoc TXTRAW to send email from the system it is concatenating some of the lines together
entry.content: When using a task to convert and send an email from an inbound Idoc TXTRAW, the email that is sent concatenates some of the lines together. It doesn't show this way when you look at it in SOST. I have been able to duplicate it using the SAPOffice function SO00  that has a document class of RAW. I can copy and past the data from the TXTRAW and it produces the same email as is sent through the task. Is there a configuration that could be changed so the email is formatted correctly? Or a fix that can be applied?

entry.title: Re: Is there any way we can change the quantity in GR onc...
entry.content:
No -- you can change-Good receipt qty once material document is created-- you can use cancellation to cancel the entire document or you can post manual 102 for cancelled qty -- ideally 122 --which is return delivery --

if Incorrect GR was posted then i would recommend cancellation of material document and do good receipt again for correct qty.

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports Group heading text change
entry.content: Hi Simon, there's a semi-colon in the middle of the last line which looks like the cause of the error.

entry.title: Command line options for Crystal
entry.content:
We currently are using rainforest to run Crystals reports from our scheduler and are looking to move away from that but continue to use the scheduler as it is monitored 24/7. Is there a way to run Crystal reports via command line using SAP? or Crystal Designer?

We are using version BOBJ 4.2 SP9

entry.title: Re: Command line options for Crystal
entry.content: Hi CRUMBO, check out Ken Hamady's site here...there's a free command line tool for exporting mentioned and several other tools.

entry.title: vf01 negative balance error and user exit with export parameter = import parameters
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am facing strange scenario and I could not able to understand the issue with tcode VF01.

We were going to automate the INBOUND DELIVERY for our customer. It means whenever vf01 is executed and billing number
gets generated same time specific data(as json)  has to be send to our customer by consuming API.
To do this I have searched for userexits in VF PACKAGE and I have implemented 4 userexits with just breakpoint(code)  in it to check which user exit will hit when I click on save button.
EXIT_SAPLV60B_001
EXIT_SAPLV60B_010
EXIT_SAPLV60B_002
USEREXIT_FILL_VBRK_VBRP

 

When the functional run the tcode VF01 they were facing negative balance error. They told me that I have made changes in the code and from
then onwards the issue started.

To fix this issue I have simply mapped the import with export parameters inside all the 4 based on the import and export parameters of the respective
userexit after removing the breakpoint.

 

FUNCTION EXIT_SAPLV60B_001.

FUNCTION EXIT_SAPLV60B_010.

Like the above I have done for others also.

After doing this mapping in all the 4 user exits the error issue got resolved. Now the transaction is running smoothly.

Then I thought that I have unnecessarily implemented 4 userexits which is of no use( by mapping import and export parameters )  as I have not written any meaningful  logic in it.

I have deleted the includes of the user exits (back to square one). Now there is no custom code in the transaction after save button is pushed.

Again the negative balance issue started popping up.

I have implemented the userexits with import and export parameters mapping and the issue is resolved again with no error.

I could not able to understand how the mapping of import and export parameters is fixing the negative balance error.

My understanding is that data flow should not be impacted when I delete the includes of userexits from se38.


This is strange issue and I have debugged alot and I could not able to understand what is happening.

 

The whole strory which I am trying to explain is only in QAS.

without these user exits the VF01 in PRD is running smoothly. 

Kindly let me know what would be consequences of the active userexits with just map of import to export in QAS and not in PRD ?

entry.title: Re: When changing text interpretation to HTML Crystal res...
entry.content:
Hi borozu, on CR2020 sp4 p1 I don't see that behaviour in a simple formula...i.e. the color applied in the Format Field > Font > Color dialogue is not overwritten when HTML Text Interpretation is applied, when there is nothing specified in the formula's style.

 

Perhaps it's something in the desc formula that is causing the issue? Can you post a sample output of from the description formula?

 

The HTML version that is used in that interpretation is fairly simplistic in that it is pretty much limited to things that you can do in a Text Object manual formatting...this in turn can lead to the output not being what the report developer wants.

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting- Applicant status configuration
entry.content: Do we have any way to download this whole setup of different application status sets as a csv or xml file?

entry.title: SAP S/4 HANA 2022 Application and HANA DB supported on RHEL 9.2
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a SAP S/4 HANA 2022 system (Application - Kernel 789_REL Patch 200and PERSON_NAME DB 2.0 SP7 Rev 072) installed on RHEL 9.0. Our OS team is planning to upgrade RHEL to 9.2. Please advise if SAP S/4 HANA 2022 system (Application - Kernel 789_REL Patch 200 and HANA DB 2.0 SP7 Rev 072) is supported on RHEL 9.2.

Thanks and Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA 2022 Application and HANA DB supported o...
entry.content:
For the HANA Database, please see

2235581 - SAP HANA: Supported Operating Systems
https://me.sap.com/notes/2235581/E

"
9.2 (HANA 2.0 SPS05 revision 59.09, HANA 2.0 SPS06 revision 67.02 and HANA 2.0 SPS07 revision 72 and newer)
"
so your OS of 9.2 is support on HANA 2 SPS7 rev 72

For the S/4HANA information see
3397243 - SAP S/4HANA 2022 - Release & Information Note
https://me.sap.com/notes/3397243/E

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA
entry.content:
Qq on the https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/apis/resource-changes-for-tasks-defects-requirements and how the API used for integrating with Jira functions.

If we were to push a Requirement from SAP Cloud ALM, at which level would it map in Jira? At the Epics level? Or at the Story or Sub-Task level? If not, would they need to maintain specific mappings to point a Requirement from Cloud ALM to an Epic in Jira?

entry.title: Purpose of customer and vendor linked to storage location and requirement
entry.content:
Hi Im fairly new to MM world and just trying to understand the purpose of customer and vendor in table T001L and its requirement. Secondly we currently have a customer vendor already pointing to plant storage location as shown below and is representing a third party location and address

Plant     StrLoc         Vendor          Customer
ABCD    1                 123               456

If we now have another plant and storage lcoation that is representing same third party location and address can we just reuse the vendor customer as shown below?

Plant     StrLoc         Vendor          Customer
EFGH    1                 123               456

entry.title: Re: Manage Allocation Rules in SAC

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content: I tried a smaller prompt and still got the same error.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Mark112358 

Thanks for sharing the code. I have changed the warpper's ui5.yaml as below and it's working.

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: taskuiwrapper
type: application
server:
  customMiddleware:
    - name: fiori-tools-proxy
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        ignoreCertError: false
        ui5:
          path:
            - /resources
            - /test-resources
          url: https://ui5.sap.com
        backend:
          - path: /bpa_role_assignment_ui.bparoleassignmentuiworkflowuimodule/api/public/workflow/rest/v1
            pathPrefix: /public/workflow/rest/v1
            url: https://spa-api-gateway-bpi-us-prod.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com
            destination: bpa_workflowruntime                      
    - name: fiori-tools-appreload
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        port: 35729
        path: webapp
        delay: 300
    - name: fiori-tools-preview
      afterMiddleware: fiori-tools-appreload
      configuration:
        component: taskuiwrapper
        ui5Theme: sap_horizon
    - name: fiori-tools-servestatic
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        paths:
          - path: /resources/bparoleassignmentui/workflowuimodule
            src: ../workflow-ui-module/webapp
          - path: /appconfig
            src: appconfig

entry.title: Re: Data Load to SAC for SuccessFactor for FTE Planning
entry.content:
hi @N1kh1l ,

Using job classification I unfortunately didn't get the required data fields like position details , employee Details , employment details etc . 

1. My question is if we cannot get all this data via one query , Would we have to  do separate queries ? 

2. If we do make separate queries how do we do it ? I tried to do this and while I mapped the fields it seems that the ID fields needs to be mapped again ( map to facts ) ( I may or may not get all the ID fields with each set of queries ) example when I do a query on position , I do not have employee details and my dimensions go unmapped and data overwritten . 

Can you help sort this ? Please?

entry.title: Transgender Day Of Visibility - March 31st 2024
entry.content:
At Pride@SAP we understand the importance of our acronym – LGBTQIA+ and how every part of our community should have the same sense of belonging.  

 

March 31st marks Transgender Day of Visibility. While there are holidays commemorating transgender people who have suffered, International Transgender Day of Visibility focuses on more of the positive aspects of what being transgender means and takes direct action in changing the biases of people who don’t understand transgender.  

 

At Pride@SAP, we are often asked “how can I be a better ally”, and there are many answers to this, but always remember, the “right” things to do or say because often there is no one “right” answer to every situation you might encounter. I have spoken at SAP before about how Allyship should be seen as progress and not perfection – we are going to get it wrong and that’s ok, but when we commit to self-education and take steps to challenge anti-transgender remarks or jokes in public spaces, including LGBTQIA+ spaces, these actions will help change the culture, making society a better, safer place for transgender people and for all people (trans or not) who do not conform to conventional gender expectations. 

Here are some tips provided by the organization GLAAD.

 

* (https://glaad.org/transgender/allies, Updated March 2021 / Adapted from MIT’s “Action Tips for Allies of Trans People.”) 

 

 

If you don’t know what pronouns to use, listen first. 
If you’re unsure which pronoun a person uses, listen first to the pronouns other people use when referring to them. Someone who knows the person well will probably use the correct pronoun. If you must ask which pronoun the person uses, start with your own. For example, “Hi, I’m Alex and I use the pronouns he and him. What about you?” Then use that person’s pronoun and encourage others to do so. If you accidently use the wrong pronoun, apologize quickly and sincerely, correct your mistake, then move on. The bigger deal you make out of the situation, the more uncomfortable it is for everyone. 

 

Understand there is no “right” or “wrong” way to transition, and that it is different for every person. 
Some transgender people access medical care like hormone replacement therapy and surgeries as part of their transition in order to align their bodies with their gender identity. Some transgender people want their authentic gender identity to be recognized without hormones or surgery. Some transgender people cannot access gender affirming healthcare due to a lack of financial resources or access to trained providers. A transgender person’s gender is not dependent on medical procedures or how they look. Accept that if someone tells you they are transgender, they are. 

 

Challenge anti-transgender remarks or jokes in public spaces, including LGB spaces. 
You may hear anti-transgender comments from anti-LGBTQ activists, but you may also hear them from LGB people. Someone may think that because they’re gay, it’s ok for them to use certain words or tell jokes about transgender people. It’s important to challenge anti-transgender remarks or jokes whenever they are said and no matter who says them. 

 

Understand the differences between “coming out” as lesbian, gay, or bisexual and “coming out” as transgender. 
“Coming out” to other people as lesbian, gay, or bisexual is typically seen as revealing a truth that allows other people to know your authentic self. The LGB community places great importance and value on the idea of being “out” in order to be happy and whole. When a transgender person has transitioned and is living their life as their authentic self–that is their truth. The world now sees them as who they truly are. Unfortunately, it can often feel disempowering for a transgender person to disclose to other people that they are transgender. Sometimes when other people learn a person is trans, they no longer see the person as “real.” Some people may choose to publicly discuss their gender history in an effort to raise awareness and make cultural change, but please don’t assume that it’s necessary for a transgender person to disclose that they are transgender in order to feel happy and whole. 

 

Know your own limits as an ally. 
Don’t be afraid to admit when you don’t know something. It is better to admit you don’t know something than to make assumptions or say something that may be incorrect or hurtful. Seek out the appropriate resources that will help you learn more. Remember being an ally is a sustained and persistent pattern of action, not an idle or stable noun.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content: @MioYasuatke Please discard my previous message. Thank you so much for helping me out.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
@Mark112358 

I see the same errors in the network tab, but the app is loaded.

The $metadata request (which is failing) is sent because it is defined in the manifest.json of your task UI app. Removing the sections below will suppress the request.

        "dataSources": {
            "mainService": {
                "uri": "/sap/opu/odata/",
                "type": "OData",
                "settings": {
                    "annotations": [],
                    "localUri": "localService/metadata.xml",
                    "odataVersion": "2.0"
                }
            }
        }
...
        "models": {
            ...
            "": {
                "dataSource": "mainService",
                "preload": true,
                "settings": {}
            }
        },

entry.title: Re: Where Did The Web Intelligence Content Go?
entry.content:
Hello nschaeffer,

This issue was already alerted in this post:
https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/bug-blog-shows-up-under-untagged-tag/qaq-p...

Please follow that post, as we will be providing updates there.

Regards,
Audrey

entry.title: How to check reports for Variance?
entry.content:
We would like to view a report with Event-based production variances. Which apps can we use?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check reports for Variance?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to view event-based production variances in company code currency, group currency and freely defined currencies in parallel ledgers, you can use the following apps:

  • Analyze Production Costs - Event-Based

  • Order Cost Details - Event-Based

  • Product Profitability with Production Variances


You can also refer to the below SAP Help Portal Documentation:

Event-Based Variance Posting


Best Regards,
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: Announcing General Availability of SAP Build Code: Speed up development with generative AI
entry.content:
Hello, thanks for sharing!

Is it/will it be possible to generate ABAP Cloud code with Joule in SAP Build code?

entry.title: Re: Notes on installing SAPGUI for Java for macOS
entry.content:
Hi,

I suppose the question about whether some feature is available in SAPGUI for Java or not, can only be answered by SAP themselves, as the non-SAP employees (such as me) have zero visibility into what will or won't be offered in the next releases.

If there is a feature such as an editor that works in SAPGUI for Windows, then whether or not it can be made available for SAPGUI for Java, Iikely depends on whether the functionality can be implemented in Java or whether there are dependencies on Windows OS specific libraries and such like, and what kind of effort would be required to make a Java implementation, and how important the feature parity is viewed by SAP via their assessment of user demand, etcetera. Again though, only SAP themselves are likely to have any insight into the answers...

entry.title: Re: HMAC-SHA1 hash verification on API Management
entry.content: Any reason why I get header parameter blank??

entry.title: Re: How to debug Fiori My Leave Request authorisation issues
entry.content:
The solution to this authorisation issue was in the email address of the particular user.  Email address is used in the authentication.    The email address of the impacted employees was a mixture of upper and lower case.

Once the email address was changed to all lower case, the access issue was resolved.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements: Object Page Custom Section containing Geomap (OData V4 and V2)
entry.content: Thanks a lot, this is the blog I am looking for.

entry.title: Seeking to understand the various table relationships for S/4 HANA Business Partner
entry.content:
Hello

We have gone live with S/4 HANA a few months ago and I am trying to get a grasp on 'Business Partner' and the relationship to the various tables that have a dependency.    As an example there are various Address tables that get populated for a particular Business Partner / Address number - ADRP, ADR6, ADRC, ADCP. 

I'm particularly interested to understand how table MOM052 gets populated - and is it possible to remove any errant entries from this table.

Can anyone suggest any documentation or blogs on this topic?

Regards

Pat

entry.title: 30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects: Starts on April 1st
entry.content:
30 Days of Sharing and Learning for Enterprise Architects: Starts on April 1st



At our 2024 NextGen SAP Enterprise Architect Forum, held at SAP's North American Headquarters in Newtown Square, PA  from Feb 26 – 29th, I said that I did not want content from our event to “live and die at the event” and for our conversations and programming to continue.

We have curated insights and content from this event in the form of presentations, recorded videos, blogs, “nuggets of next” and additional resources to share with Enterprise Architects globally across the SAP Ecosystem.

Blog Posting Schedule: 

March 30 - Pregame Show: Insider Views & Insights on the Next Generation SAP EA Forum 2024

March 31 - Kicking Off SAP Enterprise Architects 2024 Forum: A Journey of Growth and Community

April 1 - The Future Does Not Fit in the Containers of the Past

April 2 - Better. Transform. Together. Accelerating Business Transformation with EA

April 3 - Turning Strategy Into Reality With Business Architecture

April 4 - Enterprise Architects Facing the Cloud and AI Frontier

April 5 - The Enterprise Architect’s Blueprint for SAP S/4HANA Success

April 6 - Discover SAP BTP’s Strategy and Roadmap Highlights

April 7 - Unpacking the Transformation Suite Approach and Toolchain

April 8 - Simplifying your Data Readiness and Migration for SAP S/4HANA, Cloud & AI

April 9 - SAP Signavio: Next Generation Business Process Management

April 10 - Essential Toolset for Planning & Migrating to SAP S/4HANA

April 11 - Adopting a Corporate Explorers Mindset - Enterprise Architects as Corporate Explorers

April 12 - Captain Proton’s Guide to GenAI 4th Dimension

April 13 - The Heterogeneous, Composable, Autonomous Enterprise

April 14 - The Role of Enterprise Architecture to Manage SAP's Transformation into the Cloud

April 15 - Filling the Holes in your S/4 Business Case

April 16 - Discover how Tricentis is fortifying SAP S/4HANA Transformations

April 17 - Human Skills: The Multidisciplinary Edge for Enterprise Architects

April 18 - From Systems to Ecosystems: The EA Mindset in the Age of AI

April 19 - Clean Core: Mastering a future-proof and agile ERP

April 20 - How EA’s Can Prepare the Next Generation of EA’s – and Themselves

April 21 - Demystifying SAP’s Data & Analytics Solutions

April 22 - Connecting Process and Architecture to Maximize Value

April 23 - Enterprise Architecture and Sustainably - Translating Strategy into Execution

April 24 - Business Architecture: What, Why, and How

April 25 - An Enterprise EAs View on SAP Business Technology Platform

April 26 - A Primer on the SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework

April 27 - AI for EAs and Architecting for AI

April 28 - The Enterprise Architect and SAP S/4HANA Transformations

April 29 - Building and Evolving your Enterprise Architecture Practice

April 30 - Wisdom from the Next Generation SAP EA Forum Crowd and What's Next

May 1 – Sharing free eBook "Next Generation SAP Enterprise Architect Forum - 2024 Edition” generated with the help of AI of course for the SAP Community Enterprise Architect Group

Looking forward to 30 Days of Sharing and Learning with the SAP Community Enterprise Architecture Group.

You can also follow my LinkedIn posts in April 1st to 30th and hashtags  #SAP #SAPCommunity #SAPEA #NextGenSAPEA #30DaysofEALearning 

Special Thanks for our Sponsors and Supporters

SAP Enterprise Architecture Group Flag Photos

We have a lot of great material that will be sharing from April 1st to April 30th - of course there were are lot and I mean a LOT of SAP Enterprise Architecture Group Flag Photos. Community is all about the People and "People Magic" - we have so much magic happening with connecting, sharing and learning together as a community.

 

 

Source for all images and photos: Paul Kurchina

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content: I am experiencing the same problem. Error: Request failed with status code 403

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content:
Getting the same error.

"Request failed with status code 403"

Below is the Joule output.

{

 "label": "Joule.Joule_Genie",

 "level": "error",

 "message": {

 "message": "Request failed with status code 403",

 "name": "AxiosError",

 "stack": "AxiosError: Request failed with status code 403
	at settle (/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/38__@ext-lcapvsc-npm-vscode__joule@1.26.0-3/extension/out/extension.js:12081:16)
	at IncomingMessage.handleStreamEnd (/managed-content/vscode/unzipped/38__@ext-lcapvsc-npm-vscode__joule@1.26.0-3/extension/out/extension.js:12886:15)
	at IncomingMessage.emit (node:events:526:35)
	at endReadableNT (node:internal/streams/readable:1359:12)
	at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:82:21)",

 "config": {

 "transitional": {

 "silentJSONParsing": true,

 "forcedJSONParsing": true,

 "clarifyTimeoutError": false

 },

 "adapter": [

 "xhr",

 "http"

 ],

 "transformRequest": [

 null

 ],

 "transformResponse": [

 null

 ],

 "timeout": 0,

 "xsrfCookieName": "XSRF-TOKEN",

 "xsrfHeaderName": "X-XSRF-TOKEN",

 "maxContentLength": -1,

 "maxBodyLength": -1,

 "env": {},

 "headers": {

 "Accept": "application/json, text/plain, */*",

 "Content-Type": "application/json",

 "AI-Resource-Group": "default",

 "User-Agent": "axios/1.6.0",

 "Accept-Encoding": "gzip, compress, deflate, br"

 },

 "method": "get",

 "url": "https://<replaced my trial account>.us10cf.trial.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/llm/v2/lm/deployments"

 },

 "code": "ERR_BAD_REQUEST",

 "status": 403

 },

 "time": "2024-03-30T00:03:32.474Z"

}

{

 "label": "Joule.Joule_Genie",

 "level": "error",

 "message": {},

 "time": "2024-03-30T00:03:32.476Z"

}

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Code Joule 403 in Trial Account
entry.content:
The 403 error no longer appears when clearing all browser data. 

  • Clear all browser data
  • Log back into your account and navigate to SAP Build Code
  • Now the Joule prompting works and generates the data model code.

entry.title: Re: Two tables in the same section of an Object Page
entry.content:
Hi !

Yes you can do it.
First you need 2 composition view ( no associate )

define root view ZI_COMPONENTES
as select from zTABLE
composition [1..*] of Z_YourCDS1 as _Z_YourCDS1
composition [0..*] of Z_YourCDS2 as _Z_YourCDS2
{
fields,

_Z_YourCDS1,
_Z_YourCDS2
}

after that, in your metada file use normally the #LINEITEM_REFERENCE :

{
id: 'idTarea',
purpose: #STANDARD ,
type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE ,
label: 'Historial de Tareas',
position: 50 ,
targetElement: '_Z_YourCDS1' },

{
id: 'idComponente',
purpose: #STANDARD ,
type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE ,
label: 'Historial de Recomendaciones',
position: 100 ,
targetElement: '_Z_YourCDS2' }

Ready!

Regards!
Andres Diaz.

entry.title: Advance Intercompany sales Purchase order Posting Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,
 
i have a Question here on advance intercompany where my scenario is below.
 
Selling company / sales org / Plant = BMBL
Delivering company/Sales org/ plant = BMGW
 
Scenario created:1
 
So in transit level i have mapped to company code BMDE Selling code - BMDE = BMBL (Plant)
So in transit level i have mapped to company code BMGB Delivering code - BMGB = BMGW (Plant)
 
here my Question when have intercompany scenario needed to be activated for different plant in Company code BMDE & BMGB then you cannot maintain other plants here in config Level V_T001_TRNSTPLNT then how come this functionality can be adopted for other plants in S4 Hana for the company codes mentioned.
 
scenario created: 2
 
Company code Sales or selling plant Delivering plant
BMDE BMBV BMBV DE
BMGB BMHM BMHM GB
 
Transit plant BMBV
 
But my test case shows wrong where it is showing wrong Transit plant which should not be BMBL in scenario 2 but it is coming from Config. V_T001_TRNSTPLNT.
 
But here my Question when we have multiple transit plants in one single company code then how this process can be adopted in advance intercompany process.
 
can you please help some info on  this thank you.

entry.title: Re: mwst condition type
entry.content: Hello @jpfriends079,

entry.title: How to create a approval procedure in job scheduling management?
entry.content:
Introduction:

Job management is a process that supports management of solution-wide background operations that automate your business processes. It allows you to request, document, analyze, and schedule background jobs in your system environment from a central location, with a standardized workflow.

 

How to create approval procedure?

To create an approval procedure for the Job Scheduling Manager in SAP Solution Manager 7.2, you need to follow these steps:

  1. Go to the Solution Manager Configuration work center: In SAP Solution Manager, go to the Solution Manager Configuration work center.
  2. Navigate to the Job Scheduling Manager: In the Solution Manager Configuration work center, navigate to the Job Scheduling Manager.
  3. Create an approval group: In the Job Scheduling Manager, go to the Approval Groups tab and create a new approval group. Specify the name and description of the approval group, and select the users who will be part of the approval group.
  4. Create an approval process: In the Job Scheduling Manager, go to the Approval Processes tab and create a new approval process. Specify the name and description of the approval process, and select the approval group that you created in step 3.
  5. Define the approval criteria: In the Approval Processes tab, define the approval criteria for the approval process. You can specify the criteria based on the job type, frequency, and impact of the job.
  6. Assign the approval process to a job: In the Job Scheduling Manager, go to the Jobs tab and select a job. In the Properties tab, assign the approval process that you created in step 4 to the job.
  7. Activate the approval process: In the Approval Processes tab, activate the approval process.

By following these steps, you will create an approval procedure for the Job Scheduling Manager in SAP Solution Manager 7.2. When a job is scheduled, the approval process will be triggered, and the job will be approved or rejected based on the criteria that you specified in the approval process

entry.title: Re: Specify an active branch
entry.content: Any updates? I get the same error, have you solved the problem?

entry.title: SAP PI Scenario Sender REST Query or Odata
entry.content:
We are migrating SAP Gateway to SAP PI and there is a scenario where it uses OData <-> RFC, this endpoint used now is similar: <url sap gateway>$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2'

For cause of application, we wil have to create a scenario to PI using a request with GET https://host:port/RESTAdapter/apitest$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2' and ... and I see OData Sender channel in PI, but I didn't fiund anything about this subject with, my question: Is it possible to build a similiar endpoint using:

https://host:port/RESTAdapter/apitest$filter=Field1 eq 'Data1' and Field2 eq 'Field2' and ...

in SAP PI? Because we want there to be no incompatibility with the application that now consumes OData Gateway, so we want the url to be modified as little as possible.

entry.title: PTAX amount not calculated for month of march for Orissa
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am facing a issue  where PTAX is not getting calculated in the month of March

The projection is calculating for the particular month due which the the amount is below the slab rate.

 

Its taking from april to february and march its is taking seperately

 

Please suggest its very urgent

entry.title: YTD/YTG Calculation on a fiscal year
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Our client follows the fiscal year from October to September and in IBP we have the standard time profile(Jan to Dec). Can someone share any ideas to calculate the YTD/YTG to follow the fiscal year and what changes i need to do to time profile. IBP_CAGGR function is considering from Jan to December.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

BK

entry.title: Oening and closing balance
entry.content:
Hello

I have legal doc with a provision of 420 mil

I calculated the yearly provision successfully

I need to create a data action the will calculate the end period
and calculate the opening balance amount base of last year closing balance

HOW CAN I DO THAT?

entry.title: Re: keep old ABAP versions, ie in Git (?)
entry.content: [wrong comment]

entry.title: Re: keep old ABAP versions, ie in Git (?)
entry.content:
Thanks @Karin for your reply. 

Based on your info (and the gCTS course from a few years ago) I'm thinking along the lines of replaying *all* transports (we have all co/data files of the last 20 years, not sure if gCTS requires that) via Manual Push into one repo (master branch). Every transport corresponds to 1 commit. That will require some custom ABAP automation because of volume. 

Then do some scripting with git, like below, to get a nice linear timeline.

 

git commit --date=<transport release date> --amend

 

So we get a nice customizing and ABAP workbench "archive" of our current Dev system.

Should work right?

[edit]

No, it probably won't. Manual Push process uses Transport of Copies, and afaik a ToC of a very old transport does not respect the versions of objects (or customizing values) of that old transport.

entry.title: concatenate bank Key and bank account in dmee tree sap hana
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have created a DMEE tree to general payment file to the Bank that works fine. However, when I try to concatenate Bank Key and Bank Account fields using atom I am getting errors. does anyone know the right process to accomplish concatenating two element fields. 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Disable Valuehelp button for Selection field in fiori...
entry.content:
I suppose you want to restrict the selection field to only take a single value. The following annotation should do it for v4 services. If there is a value help for the data field, it will still be available. But the user can only make one selection. 

 

 

FilterExpressionRestriction.AllowedExpressions = "SingleValue"
       @Consumption.filter.multipleSelections: false 
       @Consumption.filter.selectionType: #SINGLE

 

 

See: UI5 Demo Kit | Configuring Filter Fields 

for v2 use the annotation sap:filter-restriction="single-value".

entry.title: Re: how to add a header message within the tile?
entry.content: Have you tried Setting the Table Header ?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI Odata adapter error 'WstxUnexpectedCharExcept...
entry.content:
You are seeing this issue because authentication is failing. The server is responding with a page to login. The adapter is failing to parse the html page.

Solution is to fix authentication.
